# Hussain Anajwala - AI/ML Portfolio

> Portfolio of Hussain Anajwala, a final-year Computer Engineering student specializing in AI & ML with an Honours track in Generative AI. Open to AI/ML and SDE internships.

## Sections

- [Hero](/#home): AI/ML role positioning, resume download, location, and contact entry points.
- [About](/#about): Student background, AI/ML focus, current internship, and internship search.
- [Skills](/#skills): Languages, AI/ML stack, web tools, databases, tooling, and core CS.
- [Projects](/#projects): CropScan, Savour, and E-Commerce Intelligence Suite.
- [Experience](/#experience): Cloud Counselage Pvt. Ltd. internship.
- [Education & Achievements](/#education): Vidyalankar Institute of Technology, AI & ML specialization, Generative AI honours, CGPA, and achievements.
- [Certifications](/#certifications): AI, ML, data, and software certifications.
- [Contact](/#contact): Email, phone, GitHub, LinkedIn, and LeetCode.
